creator: giffunip@tutopia.com
text:
Version 2.2 is fully multithreaded and supports high performance 2PL and MVCC (multiversion concurrency control) transaction control models.

We haven't updated hsqldb in years while waiting for the updated support in OpenOffice. The support is likely to be available in AOO 4.0 but even if it's not hsqldb will be supporting the old format RSN, so it's about time to (finally) update this package.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
